title: Documents
scope: Markdown documents with tags, semantic search (pgvector), parent links, and an LLM thinking domain that reorganizes Skipper's accumulated memories into a navigable doc tree. The long-form text store used by research, refine, print, brainstorming, and any app that wants structured prose. NOT folder organization (the Folders app) — Documents owns the content.

specs.title: Create a document
specs.behavior: Creating a document records a new markdown knowledge page with title, content, and tags, and assigns it an id.

specs.title: Read a document
specs.behavior: Reading returns a document's full content and metadata.

specs.title: List documents
specs.behavior: Listing returns all documents, optionally filtered.

specs.title: Search documents
specs.behavior: Searching matches documents semantically across content, title, and tags.

specs.title: Update a document
specs.behavior: Updating replaces a document's full content.

specs.title: Append to a document
specs.behavior: Appending adds content to the end of a document.

specs.title: Update document metadata
specs.behavior: Updating metadata changes a document's tags/title/etc. without touching its content.

specs.title: Enhance a document
specs.behavior: Enhancing uses AI to expand, improve, or flesh out sections of a document.
